name: Rhubarb and Pineapple Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups Pineapple; chopped, fresh or canned (drain if canned)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar and flour and sprinkle one quarter of this mixture over the bottom crust.
2. Arrange combined fruits in layers, sprinkling each layer with the sugar-flour mixture.
3. Dot the top layer with butter.
4. Cover with top crust.
5. Bake for 45 minutes at 350°F oven.
6. Serve warm or cold.
